children.label: A
children.text: levied on all canola or rapeseed produced in the United States and marketed; and

children.label: B
children.text: deducted from the payment made to a producer for all canola or rapeseed sold to a first purchaser.

children.heading: Direct processing
children.label: 2 Direct processing
children.text: The order shall provide that any person processing canola or rapeseed of that person’s own production and marketing the canola or rapeseed, or canola or rapeseed products, shall remit to the Board or a State organization certified to represent producers under , in the manner prescribed by the order, an assessment established at a rate equivalent to the rate provided for under subsection (d).section 7444(b)(6) of this title

children.heading: Limitation on assessments
children.label: b Limitation on assessments
children.text: No more than 1 assessment may be assessed under subsection (a) on any canola or rapeseed produced (as remitted by a first purchaser).

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Assessments required under subsection (a) shall be remitted to the Board by a first purchaser. The Board shall use State organizations certified to represent producers under to collect the assessments. If an appropriate certified State organization does not exist to collect an assessment, the assessment shall be collected by the Board. There shall be only 1 certified State organization in each State.section 7444(b)(6) of this title

children.heading: Times to remit assessment
children.label: 2 Times to remit assessment
children.text: Each first purchaser shall remit the assessment to the Board as provided for in the order.

children.heading: Initial rate
children.label: 1 Initial rate
children.text: The initial assessment rate shall be 4 cents per hundredweight of canola or rapeseed produced and marketed.

children.label: A
children.text: after the initial referendum is held under , the Board recommends an increase above 10 cents per hundredweight; andsection 7446(a) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the increase is approved in a referendum under .section 7446(b) of this title

children.heading: Credit
children.label: 3 Credit
children.text: A producer who demonstrates to the Board that the producer is participating in a program of a State organization certified to represent producers under shall receive credit, in determining the assessment due from the producer, for contributions to the program of up to 2 cents per hundredweight of canola or rapeseed marketed.section 7444(b)(6) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There shall be a late payment charge imposed on any person who fails to remit, on or before the date provided for in the order, to the Board the total amount for which the person is liable.

children.heading: Amount of charge
children.label: 2 Amount of charge
children.text: The amount of the late payment charge imposed under paragraph (1) shall be prescribed by the Board with the approval of the Secretary.

children.heading: Refund of assessments from escrow account
children.label: f Refund of assessments from escrow account
A
children.text: establish and maintain an escrow account to be used for assessment refunds; and

children.label: B
children.text: place funds in the account in accordance with paragraph (2).

children.heading: Placement of funds in account
children.label: 2 Placement of funds in account
children.text: The Board shall place in the account, from assessments collected during the period referred to in paragraph (1), an amount equal to the product obtained by multiplying the total amount of assessments collected during the period by 10 percent.

children.label: A
children.text: the producer is required to pay the assessment;

children.label: B
children.text: the producer does not support the program established under this subchapter; and

children.label: C
children.text: the producer demands the refund prior to the conduct of the referendum under .section 7446(a) of this title

children.heading: Form of demand
children.label: 4 Form of demand
children.text: The demand shall be made in accordance with such regulations, in such form, and within such time period as prescribed by the Board.

children.heading: Making of refund
children.label: 5 Making of refund
children.text: The refund shall be made on submission of proof satisfactory to the Board that the producer paid the assessment for which the refund is demanded.

children.label: A
children.text: the amount in the escrow account required by paragraph (1) is not sufficient to refund the total amount of assessments demanded by eligible producers; and

children.label: B
children.text: the order is not approved pursuant to the referendum conducted under ;section 7446(a) of this title

children.heading: Program approved
children.label: 7 Program approved
children.text: If the plan is approved pursuant to the referendum conducted under , all funds in the escrow account shall be returned to the Board for use by the Board in accordance with this subchapter.section 7446(a) of this title
